implemented: float/double Equal now compares math.Float{32,64}bits on both sides; matches proto.Equal semantics (identical NaN payloads equal, -0.0 ≠ +0.0). 5 new tests in equal_test.go; contract documented in docs/generated-api.md. PR 1 implemented: stdtime helpers (SizeStdTime/EncodeStdTime/DecodeStdTime) now live in protohelpers/. Generated stdtime.pb.go dropped from ~550 to 398 LOC. Decoder uses protowire.ConsumeTag/ConsumeVarint/ConsumeFieldValue — self-contained, no skipValue dependency. All tests pass; conformance 700/2.

PR 2 implemented: g.dests and g.destsByPath collapsed into single g.destinations map (keyed by fd.Path()). ImportTracker now carries selfDest + destinations instead of selfPkg + dests + destsByPath. goDest gained protoPkg field to preserve the proto-package-derived alias fallback in addProtoImport. resolvePkgName helper removed (callers use selfDest.pkgName directly). All tests pass; make generate-ours produces zero diff; conformance 700/2.

PR 3 implemented: FieldOption interface + registry (newOptionRegistry) replaces the four parallel resolve<X>Extension / validate<X>Options / <x>FieldType / <x>GoFieldType pipelines. Each option_<name>.go is now a struct implementing Name / Resolve / Validate / FieldType / GoFieldType. The eight inline Generate calls collapse into two registry loops. Cross-option dependency (stdtime needs pointer) routes via findOption[T]. jsontag stays outside the registry (no FieldType/GoFieldType behavior). All tests pass; make generate-ours produces zero diff; conformance 700/2; fuzz 30s green. Future options (stdduration, stdfields, anypb) just register one struct.

All four sub-beads (wiresmith-ick, -ahz, -vy9, -gz4) closed; the three flags never landed because the sub-beads aligned wiresmith with protoc idioms (paths=source_relative + option go_package + fixed protohelpers import path), eliminating the need for them.

implemented

Service-only .proto files now emit _grpc.pb.go (and _reflect.pb.go). shouldGenerateFile admits files with Services().Len()>0; main .pb.go write gated on fg.body.Len()>0; emitAllUnmarshalMethods skips its file-level helpers when no messages exist; emitRegistration allows service-only files through so the FileDescriptor still registers. emit_grpc.go synthesizes a sentinel Dest for the embedded wiresmith/options.proto so user files that transitively import it don't trip buildParameter's strict missing-dest check. New fixture under proto/basic/serviceonly/v1/ (split messages.proto + service.proto) + checked-in gen/serviceonly/v1/* outputs + test/peer/grpc_protoc_compat_serviceonly_test.go. Note: outputs land at gen/serviceonly/v1/ rather than the plan's nominal gen/basic/serviceonly/v1/ — the source-relative output rule keys outputs off fd.Path() (= relative path under --proto_path), and getting the plan's layout would have required nesting protos at proto/basic/basic/serviceonly/v1/. The go_package option was adjusted to match the resulting disk path so Go's directory-equals-import-path stays consistent.
implemented
